steps.label: Paso 1 — Transformación
steps.prompt: Animate this living room photo into a smooth 8-second cinematic reveal. A soft golden light sweeps across the room from left to right; as it passes, a cream linen sofa, a low coffee table, a TV console with a 55-inch screen, a jute rug and sheer curtains on the existing windows all materialize naturally. Keep the camera locked in the exact position and angle of the source photo. Do not change wall positions, window locations, ceiling height or floor layout. End with a subtle push-in on the fully staged room. Photorealistic, warm Mediterranean afternoon light, 9:16 vertical.

steps.label: Paso 2 — Con personas
steps.prompt: Now, keeping the room exactly as it is, add a young couple walking in through the doorway, smiling as they look around. They walk toward the sofa, sit down together, and one of them picks up a cushion while the other looks out the window. Natural, relaxed body language, soft ambient conversation sounds, no visible dialogue text. Keep lighting, camera angle and furniture identical to the previous shot.
